# anchor-litesvm agent corpus

> Machine-first documentation for writing and fixing Solana program tests with anchor-litesvm/testsvm. Every code block is included from a compiling, CI-tested crate.

## Corpus

- [Conventions, vocabulary, decision trees](https://cds-rs.github.io/anchor-litesvm/agent-skill/SKILL.md)
- [writing-tests](https://cds-rs.github.io/anchor-litesvm/agent-skill/references/writing-tests.md): one canonical suite: world setup, cast list, act, assert
- [dependencies](https://cds-rs.github.io/anchor-litesvm/agent-skill/references/dependencies.md): manifests per consumer shape (Anchor, Pinocchio, cross-engine)
- [backends](https://cds-rs.github.io/anchor-litesvm/agent-skill/references/backends.md): the TestSVM matrix and a construction recipe per engine
- [auditing](https://cds-rs.github.io/anchor-litesvm/agent-skill/references/auditing.md): security findings as byte-stable Reports; the two observability tiers
- [failure-modes](https://cds-rs.github.io/anchor-litesvm/agent-skill/references/failure-modes.md): fixes indexed by literal error text

## Optional

- [The book](https://cds-rs.github.io/anchor-litesvm/): the same documentation rendered for humans
